title: Automate SDLC using AgenticAI
description: Request to automate the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) using AgenticAI technology.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Automate SDLC using AgenticAI (DEM-2026-0122)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to streamline the Software Development Life Cycle by integrating AgenticAI technology for automation. The initiative targets improved efficiency and reduced manual effort in infrastructure-related development processes.

Business Value/Impact  
Automating SDLC will accelerate delivery timelines and enhance software quality, leading to cost savings and competitive advantage. It will also support scalability and consistent compliance across development projects.

Risk Mitigation  
Given the high-risk level, thorough testing and phased implementation will be employed to minimize disruptions. Continuous monitoring and fallback protocols will ensure system stability throughout the transition.
